title: White Queen Bee Polyurethane Makeup Pouch - 17.5cm x 23cm (1 Pc.) - Chic & Stylish Storage, Durable & Elegant Home Decor Accessory - Perfect for Travelling
features: CHIC & STYLISH STORAGE: The white queen bee polyurethane makeup pouch is designed with elegance and sophistication in mind, making it the perfect addition to your home decor and a fashionable travel companion for you, the esteemed queen bee.

DURABLE MATERIAL: Crafted with premium quality polyurethane, our makeup pouch is built to withstand daily wear and tear, providing you with a long-lasting and reliable storage solution for your beauty essentials.

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL ACCESSORY: This versatile pouch is not only perfect for organizing makeup brushes and travel-sized toiletries but also an ideal storage space for makeup and other small personal items, keeping them safe and protected.

PERFECT FOR TRAVELLING: Measuring 17.5cm x 23cm, the white queen bee makeup pouch is a convenient and space-efficient choice that fits perfectly in your luggage, ensuring your beauty essentials are always within reach on-the-go.

TIMELESS ELEGANCE: With its sleek design and undeniable charm, the white queen bee polyurethane makeup pouch is an essential accessory that adds a touch of grace and class to your daily routine and travel adventures. Make a statement and showcase your impeccable taste by adding this stunning piece to your collection.
